potholes.description: huge pothole has formed at Gaon Devi Donger, near Choudhary Clinic (Opp. Shama Dairy Farm), Andheri West (Mum-58). It is causing severe inconvenience to daily commuters and residents.
potholes.landmark: Gaon Devi Donger, near Choudhary Clinic (Opp. Shama Dairy Farm), Andheri West (Mum-58)
